trajectory.reasoning:
WHAT YOU FOUND: There are no entries shown under Comments History or Staff Notes for Order #000000062. No comments, dates, shipment discrepancies, or prior refund/return references are recorded. The order shows four items with explicit sizes and colors (e.g., Stark Fundamental Hoodie: Purple, Size XS; Mona Pullover Hoodie: Purple, Size L; Atlas Fitness Tank: Blue, Size L; Aether Gym Pant: Brown, Size 36) and a Grand Total of $196.20 with $0.00 paid and $0.00 refunded.
WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Order View page → Comments History section (empty), and Items Ordered section on http://localhost:7780/admin/sales/order/view/order_id/62/.
WHY IT MATTERS: The critical protocol requires citing specific numbers or facts from Comments History or Staff Notes to justify approving or denying a refund. Since no notes or staff comments exist documenting a wrong size/color shipment or customer communication, there is insufficient evidence to approve or deny. Escalation is required to request documentation (e.g., shipment verification, photos, or customer correspondence) before processing the refund.
